seoTitle: Daguragu vs Daly — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Daguragu and Daly. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Daguragu and Daly.
heading: Daguragu vs Daly — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Daguragu, Northern Territory and Daly, Northern Territory. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Daly has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Daguragu (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Daguragu or Daly safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Daguragu has a flood risk score of 37/100, while Daly scores 58/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Daguragu scores 55/100 for bushfire risk. Daly scores 20/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Daguragu or Daly?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Daly has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.68% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
